title: agathosma crenulata
intro: Agathosma crenulata, also known as the Cape buchu, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Agathosma crenulata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Agathosma crenulata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
